generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output (τ_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot. Controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission system transforming motor torque to intermediate torque (τ_G) for the cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming intermediate torque (τ_G) to output torque (τ_out) for the first axis with gear ratio reduction."
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller managing motion control for the first axis with position accuracy requirements (0.1 mm) and path repeatability (0.06 mm)."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring angular position (q_M) with high resolution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring output angle (q) to reduce backlash uncertainty in the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the motor, converted to torque (τ_M) using motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (bdd) describing structural model of first axis components (Motor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox) with ports for torque (τ), angular velocity (ω), and current (I)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (ibd) instantiating FirstAxis system with components (Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox) and their rotational/current flows."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink for static and kinetic friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink accounting for boundary lubrication effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink for dynamic friction behavior modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink for advanced friction dynamics with pre-sliding displacement."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionlessDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ideal dynamics model in Simulink representing frictionless behavior of the first axis (τ_M, ω, τ_out)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionAffectedDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing friction-affected dynamics with combined friction models (τ_M, ω, τ_out)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor current (I_M) streamed via MQTT from MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor angle (q_M) from MotorEncoder for backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured output angle (q) from SecondaryEncoder representing actual robot position."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) calculated from I_M using motor constants (K_t)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque (τr_M) from frictionless and friction-affected dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionlessDynamicsModel, FrictionAffectedDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque (τr_G) accounting for transmission losses in the dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionlessDynamicsModel, FrictionAffectedDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output torque (τr_out) representing the final torque after gearbox transformation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionlessDynamicsModel, FrictionAffectedDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "UML class diagram defining data traces, sources, processing components, and metadata for the Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler
]

instance FrictionShadowClass : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Concrete realization of Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) as FrictionShadow class in UML for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling structural/behavioral modeling via Block Definition Diagrams (bdd) and Internal Block Diagrams (ibd)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DataTraceLinkingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink enabling executable friction and dynamics simulation models for real-time comparison."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DataDrivenSimulationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time sensor data transmission (I_M, q) from physical components to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) defining data traces, sources, processing components, and metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceLinkingService, MetadataManagementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework integrating models and live data for semantic interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard displaying data traces and deviations between simulated/measured values (τr_M, τr_G, τr_out)."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Combines white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and black-box (Dahl, LuGre) friction models to identify friction characteristics in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance DataDrivenSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses Simulink to simulate frictionless and friction-affected behavior (τ_M, ω, τ_out) for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlImprovementInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Streams real-time sensor data (I_M, q, τ_M, ω) via MQTT to the digital shadow for processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceAvailabilityInsight
]

instance DataTraceLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Links data traces (I_M, q, τ_M, ω) to their sources (sensors/processing) and models (SysML, Simulink) in DSRM."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance MetadataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages metadata (time-series timestamps, source channels, model provenance) for semantic understanding."
    DTDFVocab:provides MetadataAvailabilityInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrates engineering models (SysML), data calculation models (Simulink), and live data via AAS framework."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDataIntegrationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays data traces (I_M, τr_M, τr_G, τr_out) and deviations between simulated/measured values in unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualDeviationAnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies static, kinetic, and viscous friction in the gearbox quantifying up to 30% of motion errors."
]

instance ControlImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables model-based control algorithms to compensate for friction, improving positional accuracy (0.1 mm) and path repeatability (0.06 mm)."
]

instance DynamicRecalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Supports dynamic recalibration of friction models during operation due to wear or tool changes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates control parameters based on deviations between simulated and measured data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataTraceAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures availability of real-time data traces (I_M, q, τ_M, ω) for friction analysis."
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Links data points to their sources (sensors/processing) and models (SysML, Simulink) for semantic traceability."
]

instance MetadataAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides time-series metadata (timestamps, source channels, model provenance) for data correlation."
]

instance VisualDeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizes deviations between simulated (τr_M, τr_G, τr_out) and measured values to guide control adjustments."
]

instance ModelDataIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrates engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), and live data via AAS for unified analysis."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **digital shadow operates in real-time** with **live data streaming** (via MQTT) and **dynamic model updates** during robot operation. The **time scale** is aligned with the robot’s control loop (e.g., CNC controller updates) and friction model recalibration needs. No explicit synchronization frequency is specified, but the system supports **continuous, multi-physics-aware identification** of joint friction (as per the paper’s goal)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **digital twin constellation** is a **purpose-driven, centralized system** with the following orchestration:
  - **Single digital shadow** for the **first axis** of the MABI robot (not a full digital twin).
  - **Components**:
    - **Asset (Mabi)**: The physical robot axis.
    - **Sources**: Sensors (encoders, current sensor) and processing components (Simulink models).
    - **Processing**: Simulink-based friction/simulation models (**Simulation M**, **Simulation GW**, **Simulation GB**).
    - **Models**: SysML (structural), Simulink (behavioral), and friction models (data calculation).
    - **Data Traces**: Linked to sources/models via **DSRM** for traceability.
  - **No external DTs or horizontal integration** is described; the focus is on **internal friction analysis** for control improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the **as-operated** lifecycle phase of the robot, focusing on **real-time friction modeling** during active use. It does not explicitly address:
  - **As-designed** (ideal) or **as-manufactured** phases (e.g., no CAD or manufacturing data integration).
  - **Long-term evolution** (e.g., wear tracking over months/years) is implied but not detailed. The system is designed for **continuous identification** of friction changes due to wear, tools, or applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity** are ensured through:
  1. **Model Validation**:
     - **Deviation analysis**: Compare **simulated data (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out)** with **measured data (r_M, r_G, r_out)** to identify friction losses.
     - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its **source** (sensor/processing) and **model** (Simulink/SysML) for reproducibility.
  2. **Uncertainty Handling**:
     - **Dual encoders** (motor + secondary) reduce backlash/uncertainty in positional measurements.
     - **Friction models** (analytical/data-driven) are combined to mitigate parameter identification challenges.
  3. **Verification**:
     - **Manufacturer-provided parameters** (e.g., motor constants) are used for dynamics modeling.
     - **Simulink simulations** validate the behavioral models against real-world data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between the **physical system (PT)** and **digital shadow (DT)** includes:
  - **Data Transmission**: **MQTT protocol** streams sensor data (I_M, q) in real-time to the digital shadow.
  - **Network Architecture**: Implicitly **client-server** (sensors → digital shadow dashboard) with no details on latency or bandwidth.
  - **No explicit protocols** for virtual-to-physical feedback (as the digital shadow is passive)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **hosting/deployment** details are not explicitly described, but the system implies:
  - **Local deployment**: Likely co-located with the robot (e.g., on the CNC controller’s network) for real-time processing.
  - **Software Stack**:
    - **Simulink** (for simulations) runs on a compatible platform (e.g., MATLAB Runtime).
    - **MQTT broker** for data streaming (e.g., Mosquitto or HiveMQ).
    - **Dashboard** (web-based or desktop) for visualization, hosted on a local server or edge device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to:
  1. **Modeling Standards**:
     - **SysML** (for structural/behavioral modeling) as per **ISO 10303-11** (STEP) and **OMG standards**.
     - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (UML class diagram) as a **domain-specific reference model**.
  2. **Simulation Standards**:
     - **Simulink** (MathWorks) for executable models, aligned with **IEC 61131-3** (for PLCopen compatibility) and **FMI (Functional Mock-up Interface)** standards.
  3. **Data Exchange**:
     - **MQTT** (OASIS standard) for lightweight messaging.
  No explicit mention of **industrial IoT standards** (e.g., OPC UA) or **cybersecurity standards** (e.g., IEC 62443)."
]
